MOTION TO COMPEL ARBITRATION
Off Calendar Feb-27-2006 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES- ATTY. JOHN E. STRINGER, TEL. NO. 934-1827 FOR THE PLAINTIFF;
ATTY. NHEN T. VUONG OF TUCKER ELLIS & WEST, TEL. NO. 617-2221 FOR THE DEFENDANT AMERICAN GREETINGS CORPORATION;

RULING - THE COURT ADOPTED IT'S TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS- DEFENDANT AMERICAN GREETINGS INTERACTIVE, INC. MOTION TO COMPEL ARBITRATION IS GRANTED. PER PARAGRAPH 11 OF THE CONTRACT, THE PARTIES WILL ENGAGE IN NEGOTIATION, FOLLOWED BY MEDIATION IN SAN DIEGO COUNTY FOLLOWED BY REFERRAL TO AMERICAN ARBITRATION ASSOCIATION FOR BINDING ARBITRATION IN SAN DIEGO COUNTY. PARTIES MAY STIPULATE TO A DIFFERENT VENUE. ACTION IS STAYED PENDING OUTCOME OF DISPUTE RESOLUTION. PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE ORDER. (301/JLW/DM) JUDGE: JAMES L. WARREN, REPORTER: CHRISTINA PAXTON, CSR# 1558
